prompt: What's the difference between A2UI v0.8 and v0.9? I'm starting a new project — which should I use and why? Also show me the same simple 'Hello World' text surface in both versions.

assertions.name: recommends-v08-for-new-projects
assertions.description: Explicitly recommends v0.8 for new/production projects because it is stable

assertions.name: v08-example-has-beginRendering
assertions.description: v0.8 Hello World example includes a beginRendering message

assertions.name: v09-example-has-createSurface
assertions.description: v0.9 Hello World example includes a createSurface message

assertions.name: mentions-flat-component-format-in-v09
assertions.description: Explains that v0.9 uses a flat component format where 'component' is a string key

assertions.name: mentions-plain-json-data-in-v09
assertions.description: Mentions that v0.9 dataModel uses plain JSON values (not valueString/valueNumber wrappers)
